case_title: EDDY AND HYDE PARTNERSHIP vs. HAGGERTY, TERRY et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE OF NOTICE TO PAY OR QUIT AND/OR NOTICE TO VACATE FILED BY PLAINTIFF EDDY AND HYDE PARTNERSHIP
